cases.name: if_elif_else
cases.template: {% if env == 'prod' %}p{% elif env == 'staging' %}s{% else %}d{% endif %}

cases.name: for_loop
cases.template: {% for n in nums %}{{ n }}{% endfor %}

cases.name: for_else
cases.template: {% for n in nums %}{{ n }}{% else %}empty{% endfor %}

cases.name: tuple_unpack
cases.template: {% for k, v in items %}{{ k }}={{ v }};{% endfor %}

cases.name: test_expression
cases.template: {% if value is divisibleby(3) %}yes{% else %}no{% endif %}
